title: kayea manii
intro: Kayea manii, also known as the Kayea tree or West Indian mahogany, is a species of flowering plant in the family Calophyllaceae. The medicinal properties of Kayea manii include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of using Kayea manii include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and provide relief from skin conditions such as eczema and dermatitis. Kayea manii can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, allowing for a range of applications in traditional medicine.
